workLog: Reviewed PR 1766 state: 5 unresolved review threads (1 CodeRabbit Major + 4 Copilot)

Comment 1 (CodeRabbit, templates/agents/negotiation.shared.md:142): unverified Project Deal empirical claims; added internal-research disclaimer + flagged dollar values as illustrative across template, copilot-cli, vs-code-agents, .agents/skills/, docs/agent-catalog.md
Comment 2 (Copilot, docs/agent-catalog.md:31): catalog listed Claude as available platform but generator does not target src/claude/; dropped Claude from negotiation row
Comment 3 (Copilot, templates/agents/negotiation.shared.md:4): added model_tier: opus to enforce senior-tier routing via configuration (matches sibling pattern in issue-feature-review.shared.md)
Comment 4 (Copilot, .agents/skills/negotiation.md:10): PR description claimed 7 crystallized skills but file contains 10 (Skill-Negotiation-001 through 010); updated PR description from 7 to 10
Comment 5 (Copilot, docs/agent-catalog.md:3): intro said '22 specialized agents' but table enumerates 23; updated to 23
Regenerated platform files via build/generate_agents.py (model_tier is template-only metadata; not propagated to vscode/copilot-cli output by design)
Round 2 (rjmurillo flagged): added src/claude/negotiation.md by hand per templates/README.md:131 (src/claude/ is not auto-generated); restored Claude in catalog row

Round 3 (user request): migrated skill from .agents/skills/negotiation.md to .claude/skills/negotiation/SKILL.md per .claude/skills/CLAUDE.md schema; full 10 skills moved to references/skills.md (progressive disclosure under 500-line limit)

Round 4 (Copilot follow-up): removed double blank line + added missing --- separator in src/claude/negotiation.md; replaced unsourced unwind percentages in references/skills.md; bumped SEMANTIC_INDEX.yaml last_updated to 2026-04-27
Round 5 (Copilot): bumped marketplace.json claude-agents and project-toolkit agent counts 23->24; corrected episode files_changed 0->8
